articles.title: Building Reliable AI Agents with Tool Use
articles.summary_en: Simon explores patterns for building AI agents that reliably use tools. He covers retry strategies, output validation, and the importance of keeping tool interfaces simple and well-documented.
articles.summary_zh: Simon Willison discusses the key patterns for building AI agents that effectively use tools. He covers retry strategies, output validation, and how to keep tool interfaces simple and well-documented.
articles.pacer_reason_en: Conceptual: Explains what makes AI agents reliable
articles.pacer_reason_zh: Conceptual: Explains what makes AI agents reliable

articles.title: How I Deploy My Side Projects with Docker Compose
articles.summary_en: Jeff shares his Docker Compose workflow for deploying side projects on a single VPS. Covers Traefik reverse proxy, automated SSL, and monitoring with minimal overhead.
articles.summary_zh: Jeff explains his Docker Compose workflow for deploying side projects on a single VPS, including Traefik reverse proxy configuration, automated SSL, and monitoring.

articles.title: The Phishing Attack That Bypassed MFA
articles.summary_en: Krebs reports on a sophisticated phishing campaign that successfully bypassed multi-factor authentication at several Fortune 500 companies using real-time proxy techniques.
articles.summary_zh: Krebs details a sophisticated phishing campaign that used real-time proxy techniques to bypass multi-factor authentication at several Fortune 500 companies.
articles.pacer_reason_en: Evidence: Case study of a real-world security breach
articles.pacer_reason_zh: Evidence: Case study of a real-world security breach

articles.title: What Cooking Taught Me About Software Architecture
articles.summary_en: Dan Abramov draws parallels between mise en place in professional kitchens and clean software architecture. Both require preparation, organization, and the discipline to clean as you go.
articles.summary_zh: Dan Abramov draws parallels between professional kitchen mise en place and clean software architecture, showing both require preparation, organization, and cleaning up as you go.
articles.pacer_reason_en: Analogous: Draws parallels between cooking and software
articles.pacer_reason_zh: Analogous: Draws parallels between cooking and software

articles.title: Understanding Consensus Algorithms: Raft vs Paxos
articles.summary_en: Eli provides a clear comparison of Raft and Paxos consensus algorithms, explaining when each is more appropriate and their trade-offs in real distributed systems.
articles.summary_zh: Eli provides a clear comparison of Raft and Paxos consensus algorithms, explaining their trade-offs in real distributed systems.

articles.title: Complete Guide to HTTP Status Codes
articles.summary_en: An exhaustive reference of HTTP status codes with real-world examples of when to use each one. Covers common mistakes like using 200 for errors.
articles.summary_zh: A comprehensive reference for HTTP status codes with real-world examples, covering common mistakes like using 200 for errors.
articles.pacer_reason_en: Reference: Lookup material for HTTP status codes
articles.pacer_reason_zh: Reference: Lookup material for HTTP status codes

articles.title: We Benchmarked 10 Vector Databases
articles.summary_en: Dynomight conducted extensive benchmarks of 10 popular vector databases across latency, throughput, and recall metrics. Surprising results show that simpler solutions often outperform specialized ones.
articles.summary_zh: Dynomight benchmarked 10 popular vector databases for latency, throughput, and recall, finding that simpler solutions often outperform specialized ones.

articles.title: Setting Up Neovim for Modern Web Development
articles.summary_en: Mitchell Hashimoto shares his complete Neovim configuration for web development in 2026, covering LSP, TypeScript integration, Tailwind CSS autocompletion, and AI-assisted coding.
articles.summary_zh: Mitchell Hashimoto shares his complete Neovim configuration for web development, covering LSP, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS autocomplete, and AI-assisted coding.
articles.pacer_reason_en: Procedural: Setup guide for development tools
articles.pacer_reason_zh: Procedural: Setup guide for development tools
